universal_rules: reserve the lower 32 percent as a calm overlay-safe area
keep important subjects away from extreme crop edges

styles.label: documentary editorial photography
styles.medium: naturalistic documentary editorial photograph with credible physical detail and restrained color grading
styles.default_palette: natural neutral tones with one controlled accent

styles.label: architectural and industrial landscape
styles.medium: architectural editorial photography or precise environmental illustration emphasizing scale and infrastructure
styles.default_texture: material surfaces, haze and structural depth

styles.label: conceptual editorial still life
styles.medium: carefully staged editorial still life using a few symbolic physical objects
styles.default_palette: warm neutral studio tones with a precise contrasting accent
styles.default_texture: paper, glass, metal or ceramic material detail

styles.label: paper-cut editorial illustration
styles.medium: layered paper-cut or screen-printed editorial illustration with tactile edges and restrained depth
styles.default_palette: limited print palette chosen from the article mood
styles.default_texture: paper fibers and subtle print registration

styles.label: isometric systems metaphor
styles.medium: clean isometric editorial illustration showing interacting systems without interface labels
styles.default_palette: balanced technical colors with low saturation
styles.default_texture: crisp matte surfaces and controlled shadows

styles.label: restrained 3D object study
styles.medium: premium restrained 3D object study centered on one article-specific sculptural metaphor
styles.default_palette: article-specific studio palette, avoiding default neon blue
styles.default_texture: high-quality physical materials with soft studio light

styles.label: label-free geometric infographic
styles.medium: minimal label-free geometric editorial infographic expressing relationships through shape, scale and flow
styles.default_palette: three-color analytical palette with strong tonal separation
styles.default_texture: flat print texture with subtle depth cues

styles.label: archival newsroom collage
styles.medium: restrained archival newsroom collage using documents, environments and material fragments without readable text
styles.default_palette: muted archival paper tones with one contemporary accent
styles.default_texture: newsprint, paper edges and photographic fragments

site_hero.label: Homepage hero poster
site_hero.framing_hint: 4:5 vertical homepage hero poster, premium editorial 3D illustration, single iconic focal object, high quality
site_hero.prompt_clause: Create a polished vertical hero poster for a Chinese AI editorial blog: one elegant glass signal tower floating in a quiet dark-blue atmosphere, layered translucent ribbons orbiting around it, soft porcelain-white highlights, restrained cyan glow, premium magazine-quality 3D editorial illustration.
site_hero.safe_area_clause: Use a center-weighted vertical composition with the main object in the middle third, generous negative space around the subject, clean silhouette, no small decorative clutter, no text, no logos, no UI screenshots.

post_cover.label: Article cover banner
post_cover.framing_hint: Wide landscape editorial banner, website cover image, high quality
post_cover.prompt_clause: A horizontal editorial cover banner for a Chinese AI article, abstract but readable, shaped for a website story card. Let the article-specific prompt determine the medium and visual metaphor, allowing varied editorial photography, illustration, still life, infographic, architectural, or restrained 3D styles rather than one fixed sci-fi look.
post_cover.safe_area_clause: Reserve the lower 30 percent as a calm text-safe area with fewer sharp details.

series_cover.label: Series cover banner
series_cover.framing_hint: Wide landscape editorial banner, series cover image, high quality
series_cover.prompt_clause: A horizontal editorial banner that feels stable and repeatable for a long-running AI content series.
series_cover.safe_area_clause: Keep the lower 30 percent calmer for overlay copy and keep the visual center in the upper middle.

topic_cover.label: Topic cover banner
topic_cover.framing_hint: Wide landscape editorial banner, topic cover image, high quality
topic_cover.prompt_clause: A horizontal editorial banner for an AI topic line, emphasizing continuity, signal flow, and long-term tracking rather than a single event.
topic_cover.safe_area_clause: Reserve the lower 30 percent as a calmer overlay-safe zone and avoid clutter.
